buildingDetails.name: Cursor
buildingDetails.desc: Autoclicks once every 10 seconds.

buildingDetails.name: Grandma
buildingDetails.desc: A nice grandma to bake more cookies.

buildingDetails.name: Farm
buildingDetails.desc: Grows cookie plants from cookie seeds.

buildingDetails.name: Mine
buildingDetails.desc: Mines out cookie dough and chocolate chips.

buildingDetails.name: Factory
buildingDetails.desc: Produces large quantities of cookies.

buildingDetails.name: Bank
buildingDetails.desc: Generates cookies from interest.

buildingDetails.name: Temple
buildingDetails.desc: Full of precious, ancient chocolate.

buildingDetails.name: Wizard tower
buildingDetails.desc: Summons cookies with magic spells.

buildingDetails.name: Shipment
buildingDetails.desc: Brings in fresh cookies from the cookie planet.

buildingDetails.name: Alchemy lab
buildingDetails.desc: Turns gold into cookies!

buildingDetails.name: Portal
buildingDetails.desc: Opens a door to the Cookieverse.

buildingDetails.name: Time machine
buildingDetails.desc: Brings cookies from the past, before they were even eaten.

buildingDetails.name: Antimatter condenser
buildingDetails.desc: Condenses the antimatter in the universe into cookies.

buildingDetails.name: Prism
buildingDetails.desc: Converts light itself into cookies.

buildingDetails.name: Chancemaker
buildingDetails.desc: Generates cookies out of thin air through sheer luck.

buildingDetails.name: Fractal engine
buildingDetails.desc: Turns cookies into even more cookies.

buildingDetails.name: Javascript console
buildingDetails.desc: Creates cookies from the very code this game was written in.
